posts.description: Jordan Hammond Bali workshop latest post
posts.description_zh: Jordan Hammond 巴厘岛摄影工作坊 · 最新帖
posts.highlight: 巴厘岛摄影工作坊 · 最新发布
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier trotting along a terraced rice paddy pathway in Bali at golden hour, lush green terraces cascading down misty hillsides, warm tropical light, travel photography mood, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.
posts.caption_en: June has been a busy one! Having recently wrapped up a 10-day workshop in Vietnam, I'm now midway through a 9-day workshop here in Bali. It's always a privilege to share these places with fellow photographers.
posts.caption_zh: 六月真的好忙！刚结束越南十天摄影工作坊，现在又在巴厘岛的九天工作坊进行中。能和摄友一起探索这些地方，真是莫大的荣幸。

posts.description_zh: 超新鲜爆款萌犬视频 5天内
posts.highlight: 蓬松日系小狗 · 本周新爆款
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier sitting next to a fluffy white mochi dessert on a pastel-colored cafe table, Japanese aesthetic, adorable curious expression, cloud-like fluffy white fur, soft warm indoor light, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.
posts.caption_en: Fluffy Kebab-chan? Just tried the trending mochyurin sweet! When I used Gemini AI to remove the background, it gave me a fluffy cloud-like effect instead — just like Keba's fur texture!
posts.caption_zh: 蓬松けばっちゅりん？刚尝试了热门甜点もっちゅりん！用Gemini去背景时，意外做出了蓬松云朵效果，跟Keba的毛一模一样～太可爱了！

posts.description_zh: 世界旅行摄影 · 极光与异域风光
posts.highlight: 世界旅行摄影 · 极光与异域风光
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier standing on a snowy Norwegian hilltop, the Northern Lights glowing vivid green and purple across the dark arctic sky above, vast dark landscape stretching into the distance, long-exposure travel photography mood, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.
posts.caption_en: Since 2018, my Sony camera has been my passport to the world. I've chased the Northern Lights across Norway, walked through rain-soaked forests in Nicaragua, stood in Saudi Arabia's endless deserts, and explored Europe's most vibrant autumn scenery.
posts.caption_zh: 自2018年以来，相机成了探索世界的通行证。追逐挪威极光、漫步尼加拉瓜雨林、站在沙特无垠的沙漠，探索欧洲最绚烂的秋色……每段旅程都是全新世界。

posts.description_zh: 乡村小奶狗 Haloooo 可爱日常

posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier peeking cheerfully over a rustic wooden gate in a green countryside field, soft morning mist in background, golden hour light, bright curious eyes, pastoral rural charm, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.
posts.caption_zh: 你好啊～ #乡村狗狗 #幼犬 #狗狗 #可爱

posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier caught mid-leap in a joyful flying jump toward the camera, pure excitement on its face, paws outstretched, bright green grass park background, dynamic action freeze-frame, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.
posts.caption_zh: 就是这样！跳起来！#GoldDogZeus #飞扑 #狗狗 #可爱

posts.caption_zh: 比虚伪的人好多了 🫶🏻🐾 #狗狗 #山地犬 #狗狗爱好者

posts.caption_zh: 狗狗的爪爪>>>>>> #狗狗 #救援犬 #可爱动物 #狗爪
